query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totale,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ppvHash IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_ppv_hash,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ppvHash IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as senza_ppv_hash
FROM news_items;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totale,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ppvHash IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_ppv_hash,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ppvHash IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as senza_ppv_hash
FROM news_items;
